_comment: Router + state map for genesis (v0.1.0). Read FIRST. Lazy-load only what a phase needs; keep invariants near the work; keep durable state in files.
reinjection_rule: Re-read references/invariants.md at each phase boundary, before writing any spec doc, and at the top of the spec-analyze gate. It is short by design; never rely on having read it earlier in a long session.

modes._comment: Pick ONE from the user's request, then read its file.

scripts._comment: anchors.py is the ONE implementation of the anchor grammar/normalizer/hash from references/anchor-contract.md; backlog.py and analyze_spec.py both import it.

external_tools.project_map: tools/project-map/build.py (the cartographer; genesis invokes it at pipeline step 5; see tools/project-map/CONTRACT.md)

state_files._comment: Durable state lives in files in the USER's repo, not in the conversation.
state_files.spec_docs: docs/{decisions,architecture,glossary,open-questions}.md — anchored; COMMITTED; the source of truth
state_files.backlog_machine: genesis.tasks.json — machine source of task state; COMMITTED; mutated only via backlog.py
state_files.backlog_render: PLAN.md — GENERATED human render; COMMITTED; never hand-edited
state_files.canon: RULES.md (canon) + CLAUDE.md (@import wrapper) — COMMITTED; never overwrite, read-and-extend
state_files.archive: project-context/ — raw interview + distilled summary; COMMITTED; NOT a source of truth

gitignore_policy: Commit docs/, genesis.tasks.json, PLAN.md, RULES.md, CLAUDE.md, project-context/ (source of truth + history). Gitignore .map/ and .genesis/ (rebuildable/local).
